purpose: Third real historical SPY Clean Fast Break replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, and auto-trading.
boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated SPY source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.
Macro, IV, event, and 24H context fields remain unconfirmed because the source CSV does not provide confirmed context values.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, or auto-trading behavior.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show a bounded 2026-04-10 tight pause between 678.45 and 682.03; no later reclaim or break is available to this row.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: watching_clean_fast_break_tight_pause_context.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: watch the SPY Clean Fast Break tight-pause context for a later completed break; this is not a live trade instruction or execution recommendation.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp reclaim the 2026-04-10 pause and close at 682.48 above the 682.03 pause high; later 2026-04-13 follow-through is not used.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: clean_fast_break_initial_break_candidate.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: completed Clean Fast Break initial break candidate above the tight pause; this is not an execution recommendation, live trade instruction, or trade outcome assumption.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show same-session follow-through to a 686.00 close after the earlier completed break; no 2026-04-14 or 2026-04-15 rows are used.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: clean_fast_break_follow_through_confirming_context.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: prior completed Clean Fast Break is now follow-through context, not a new fresh trigger; this is not a live trade instruction or execution recommendation.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show a higher 2026-04-15 base after the 2026-04-13 and 2026-04-14 advance, holding below the later 14:30 break above 700.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: watching_higher_base_after_fast_break.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: watch the higher base after the prior fast break for a fresh completed break; no later 14:30 row is assumed.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show the first proposed fresh completed-bar higher-base break, reaching 700.03 and closing 700.01.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: clean_fast_break_fresh_break_signal_candidate.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: completed fresh Clean Fast Break signal-stage candidate above the higher base; this is not an execution recommendation, live trade instruction, or trade outcome assumption.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show the 15:30 row holding near the 700 area after the earlier completed 14:30 break; no profitability, P&L, execution, or trade outcome is asserted.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH third-real SPY Clean Fast Break replay row: clean_fast_break_post_break_no_fresh_trigger.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: prior completed Clean Fast Break trigger is no longer fresh after the 14:30 break; this is not a live trade instruction or execution recommendation.
